SUM.name: SUM
SUM.performance_notes: Always SE-safe. Prefer SUM over SUMX when aggregating a single column.

AVERAGE.name: AVERAGE
AVERAGE.performance_notes: SE-safe. Prefer over AVERAGEX on a single column.

COUNT.name: COUNT
COUNT.performance_notes: SE-safe. Counts non-blank numeric values in a column.

alternatives.when: Counting all rows regardless of blanks

COUNTA.name: COUNTA
COUNTA.performance_notes: SE-safe. Counts non-blank values of any type.

alternatives.improvement: Clearer intent when you want row count

COUNTBLANK.name: COUNTBLANK
COUNTBLANK.performance_notes: SE-safe. Counts blank values in a column.

COUNTROWS.name: COUNTROWS
COUNTROWS.performance_notes: SE-safe. Preferred way to count rows in a table or table expression.

MIN.name: MIN
MIN.performance_notes: SE-safe when applied to a column. Two-argument form compares two scalars.

MAX.name: MAX
MAX.performance_notes: SE-safe when applied to a column. Prefer MAX over MAXX for single column.

PRODUCT.name: PRODUCT
PRODUCT.performance_notes: SE-safe. Multiplies all values in a column.

MEDIAN.name: MEDIAN
MEDIAN.performance_notes: FE-only due to sorting requirement. Can be slow on high cardinality columns.

SUMX.name: SUMX
SUMX.performance_notes: SE-pushable only if expression is a simple column reference. Complex expressions cause CallbackDataID. Prefer SUM when iterating a single column.

alternatives.improvement: Always SE-safe, no row context overhead

alternatives.when: Expression is simple multiplication of two columns
alternatives.improvement: Still SE-pushable for basic arithmetic on columns

AVERAGEX.name: AVERAGEX
AVERAGEX.performance_notes: SE-pushable only for simple column expressions. Use AVERAGE for single columns.

COUNTX.name: COUNTX
COUNTX.performance_notes: SE-pushable only for simple expressions. Use COUNT or COUNTROWS when possible.

alternatives.when: Counting non-blank values in a column

MAXX.name: MAXX
MAXX.performance_notes: SE-pushable only for simple column references. Use MAX for single columns.

alternatives.when: Getting max of a single column

MINX.name: MINX
MINX.performance_notes: SE-pushable only for simple column references. Use MIN for single columns.

alternatives.when: Getting min of a single column

PRODUCTX.name: PRODUCTX
PRODUCTX.performance_notes: Iterator form of PRODUCT. Use PRODUCT for single column.

alternatives.when: Multiplying values in a single column

RANKX.name: RANKX
RANKX.performance_notes: Always FE-only due to sorting. Evaluates expression for every row. Very expensive on large tables.

CONCATENATEX.name: CONCATENATEX
CONCATENATEX.performance_notes: Always FE-only. String concatenation is inherently row-by-row.

MEDIANX.name: MEDIANX
MEDIANX.performance_notes: FE-only. Requires sorting all evaluated values.

alternatives.improvement: Slightly less overhead without row context

STDEVX.S.name: STDEVX.S
STDEVX.S.performance_notes: Sample standard deviation iterator. SE-pushable for simple column references.

alternatives.when: Standard deviation of a single column

STDEVX.P.name: STDEVX.P
STDEVX.P.performance_notes: Population standard deviation iterator. SE-pushable for simple column references.

alternatives.when: Standard deviation of a single column

VARX.S.name: VARX.S
VARX.S.performance_notes: Sample variance iterator. SE-pushable for simple column references.

VARX.P.name: VARX.P
VARX.P.performance_notes: Population variance iterator. SE-pushable for simple column references.

CALCULATE.name: CALCULATE
CALCULATE.performance_notes: Core filter modifier. Performs context transition (row-to-filter). CALCULATE with no filters still performs context transition. Nested CALCULATE can cause unexpected filter interactions.

CALCULATETABLE.name: CALCULATETABLE
CALCULATETABLE.performance_notes: Table version of CALCULATE. Same filter context modification semantics.

FILTER.name: FILTER
FILTER.performance_notes: Creates row context to evaluate filter expression. Iterates every row. Use column filters in CALCULATE instead when possible. FILTER on the entire base table is a common anti-pattern.

alternatives.improvement: Avoids row-by-row iteration, SE can optimize

ALL.name: ALL
ALL.performance_notes: Removes filters from table or columns. As a CALCULATE modifier, it removes all filters. As a table function, returns all distinct values.

alternatives.when: Removing filters from specific columns only

alternatives.improvement: Removes all filters except specified columns

ALLEXCEPT.name: ALLEXCEPT
ALLEXCEPT.performance_notes: Removes all filters except on specified columns. As CALCULATE modifier, preserves specified column filters.

ALLSELECTED.name: ALLSELECTED
ALLSELECTED.performance_notes: Restores the shadow filter context from the outermost query. Complex semantics — use with care. Often used for percentage-of-visible-total calculations.

ALLNOBLANKROW.name: ALLNOBLANKROW
ALLNOBLANKROW.performance_notes: Like ALL but excludes the blank row added for invalid relationships.

ALLCROSSFILTERED.name: ALLCROSSFILTERED
ALLCROSSFILTERED.performance_notes: Removes all filters applied to a table, including cross-filters from related tables.

REMOVEFILTERS.name: REMOVEFILTERS
REMOVEFILTERS.performance_notes: Syntactic sugar for ALL when used as CALCULATE modifier. Preferred over ALL for clarity when removing filters.

KEEPFILTERS.name: KEEPFILTERS
KEEPFILTERS.performance_notes: Intersects with existing filters instead of replacing them. Used inside CALCULATE to add rather than override filters.

VALUES.name: VALUES
VALUES.performance_notes: Returns distinct values respecting current filter context. Includes blank row if relationship is invalid.

alternatives.when: You need to exclude the blank row
alternatives.improvement: Never includes the blank row from invalid relationships

DISTINCT.name: DISTINCT
DISTINCT.performance_notes: Returns distinct values, never includes the blank row. Use VALUES when you need the blank row.

SELECTEDVALUE.name: SELECTEDVALUE
SELECTEDVALUE.performance_notes: Efficient way to get the single selected value of a column. Returns alternate result (or BLANK) if more than one value.

HASONEVALUE.name: HASONEVALUE
HASONEVALUE.performance_notes: Checks if exactly one value is visible in current filter context.

alternatives.improvement: Combines check and retrieval in one call

HASONEFILTER.name: HASONEFILTER
HASONEFILTER.performance_notes: Checks if exactly one direct filter is applied to a column.

ISFILTERED.name: ISFILTERED
ISFILTERED.performance_notes: Checks if a direct filter is applied to a column.

ISCROSSFILTERED.name: ISCROSSFILTERED
ISCROSSFILTERED.performance_notes: Checks if a column is filtered directly or through a relationship.

ISINSCOPE.name: ISINSCOPE
ISINSCOPE.performance_notes: Returns TRUE if the column is used as a grouping level in the query. Useful for subtotal/total detection.

SUMMARIZE.name: SUMMARIZE
SUMMARIZE.performance_notes: SUMMARIZE with added columns is a known anti-pattern. Use ADDCOLUMNS + SUMMARIZE (groupby only) or SUMMARIZECOLUMNS instead.

alternatives.when: Adding calculated columns to grouped results
alternatives.improvement: Avoids SUMMARIZE expression evaluation bug (context issues)
Optimized for VertiPaq, handles blank rows correctly

SUMMARIZECOLUMNS.name: SUMMARIZECOLUMNS
SUMMARIZECOLUMNS.performance_notes: Most efficient grouping function. Used internally by Power BI visuals. Automatically removes blank rows. Cannot be used inside CALCULATE.

ADDCOLUMNS.name: ADDCOLUMNS
ADDCOLUMNS.performance_notes: Adds computed columns to a table. Creates row context for expression evaluation. Use with SUMMARIZE(groupby-only) pattern.

SELECTCOLUMNS.name: SELECTCOLUMNS
SELECTCOLUMNS.performance_notes: Projects specific columns. Creates row context. Use to reduce columns before further operations.

TOPN.name: TOPN
TOPN.performance_notes: FE-only due to sorting. Always wrap TOPN in CALCULATE for proper filter context.

SAMPLE.name: SAMPLE
SAMPLE.performance_notes: FE-only. Returns an evenly distributed sample of rows.

ROW.name: ROW
ROW.performance_notes: Creates a single-row table. Useful in DAX queries and table constructors.

DATATABLE.name: DATATABLE
DATATABLE.performance_notes: Creates a table from literal values. Useful for static lookup tables.

GENERATE.name: GENERATE
GENERATE.performance_notes: Cross-apply (inner join). Evaluates Table2Expression for each row of Table1. Expensive for large tables.

GENERATEALL.name: GENERATEALL
GENERATEALL.performance_notes: Like GENERATE but keeps rows even when Table2Expression returns empty (left outer join).

GENERATESERIES.name: GENERATESERIES
GENERATESERIES.performance_notes: Generates a single-column table of numbers or dates. SE-safe.

CROSSJOIN.name: CROSSJOIN
CROSSJOIN.performance_notes: Cartesian product. Result row count = Table1 rows x Table2 rows. Use carefully on large tables.

UNION.name: UNION
UNION.performance_notes: Appends tables vertically. Columns matched by position, not name. Includes duplicates.

INTERSECT.name: INTERSECT
INTERSECT.performance_notes: Returns rows that exist in both tables. Semi-join semantics.

EXCEPT.name: EXCEPT
EXCEPT.performance_notes: Returns rows in LeftTable that are not in RightTable. Anti-semi-join.

NATURALINNERJOIN.name: NATURALINNERJOIN
NATURALINNERJOIN.performance_notes: Inner join using relationship columns. Tables must have an existing relationship.

NATURALLEFTOUTERJOIN.name: NATURALLEFTOUTERJOIN
NATURALLEFTOUTERJOIN.performance_notes: Left outer join using relationship columns. Tables must have an existing relationship.

GROUPBY.name: GROUPBY
GROUPBY.performance_notes: Groups rows and allows CURRENTGROUP() aggregation. Use SUMMARIZECOLUMNS when possible for better performance.

ROLLUP.name: ROLLUP
ROLLUP.performance_notes: Used with SUMMARIZE or SUMMARIZECOLUMNS to add subtotal rows.

ROLLUPADDISSUBTOTAL.name: ROLLUPADDISSUBTOTAL
ROLLUPADDISSUBTOTAL.performance_notes: Used in SUMMARIZECOLUMNS. Adds subtotal rows with an indicator column.

RELATED.name: RELATED
RELATED.performance_notes: SE-safe. Follows many-to-one relationship. Requires row context on the many side.

RELATEDTABLE.name: RELATEDTABLE
RELATEDTABLE.performance_notes: SE-safe. Follows one-to-many relationship. Equivalent to CALCULATETABLE(table).

USERELATIONSHIP.name: USERELATIONSHIP
USERELATIONSHIP.performance_notes: Activates an inactive relationship for the duration of CALCULATE. Only one relationship between two tables can be active.

CROSSFILTER.name: CROSSFILTER
CROSSFILTER.performance_notes: Changes cross-filter direction for a relationship. Values: None, OneWay, Both.

TREATAS.name: TREATAS
TREATAS.performance_notes: Applies virtual relationship. More efficient than INTERSECT/FILTER patterns for applying filters across unrelated tables.

LOOKUPVALUE.name: LOOKUPVALUE
LOOKUPVALUE.performance_notes: FE-only. Scans table for matching rows. Prefer RELATED when a relationship exists.

CONTAINS.name: CONTAINS
CONTAINS.performance_notes: FE-only. Checks if value exists in table. Consider IN operator for simple checks.

CONTAINSROW.name: CONTAINSROW
CONTAINSROW.performance_notes: FE-only. Checks if a row with given values exists. Equivalent to IN operator.

IF.name: IF
IF.performance_notes: FE-only. Major CallbackDataID source when used inside iterators. Consider SWITCH for multiple conditions. In iterators, IF causes row-by-row FE evaluation.

SWITCH.name: SWITCH
SWITCH.performance_notes: FE-only, same callback risk as IF in iterators. Preferred over nested IF for readability.

AND.name: AND
AND.performance_notes: Prefer && operator for readability. AND() only accepts two arguments.

OR.name: OR
OR.performance_notes: Prefer || operator for readability. OR() only accepts two arguments.

COALESCE.name: COALESCE
COALESCE.performance_notes: Returns first non-blank value. More efficient than IF(ISBLANK(...), ..., ...) pattern.

CONCATENATE.name: CONCATENATE
CONCATENATE.performance_notes: FE-only. Use & operator instead — same result, accepts more than 2 arguments.

FORMAT.name: FORMAT
FORMAT.performance_notes: Always FE-only. Major CallbackDataID source. Never use FORMAT inside iterators. Use format strings on measures instead. Returns text, breaking numeric aggregation.

alternatives.improvement: Keeps values numeric, allows SE optimization
Pre-computed in model, no runtime cost

LEFT.name: LEFT
LEFT.performance_notes: FE-only. String manipulation forces FE evaluation. Pre-compute in Power Query when possible.

alternatives.improvement: Computed at refresh time, not query time

RIGHT.name: RIGHT
RIGHT.performance_notes: FE-only. String manipulation forces FE evaluation.

MID.name: MID
MID.performance_notes: FE-only. Extracts substring. Pre-compute in Power Query when possible.

SUBSTITUTE.name: SUBSTITUTE
SUBSTITUTE.performance_notes: FE-only. Replaces occurrences of a substring.

SEARCH.name: SEARCH
SEARCH.performance_notes: FE-only. Case-insensitive text search. Supports wildcards (* and ?).

FIND.name: FIND
FIND.performance_notes: FE-only. Case-sensitive text search. No wildcard support.

REPT.name: REPT
REPT.performance_notes: FE-only. Repeats text a given number of times.

UNICHAR.name: UNICHAR
UNICHAR.performance_notes: FE-only. Returns Unicode character from code point.

UNICODE.name: UNICODE
UNICODE.performance_notes: FE-only. Returns Unicode code point for first character.

DATE.name: DATE
DATE.performance_notes: SE-safe. Constructs a date from year, month, day components.

YEAR.name: YEAR
YEAR.performance_notes: SE-safe. Extracts year from a date.

MONTH.name: MONTH
MONTH.performance_notes: SE-safe. Extracts month (1-12) from a date.

DAY.name: DAY
DAY.performance_notes: SE-safe. Extracts day of month from a date.

NOW.name: NOW
NOW.performance_notes: FE-only. Returns current datetime. Prevents caching. Use sparingly.

TODAY.name: TODAY
TODAY.performance_notes: FE-only. Returns current date. Prevents caching. Consider using a slicer-driven date parameter.

EOMONTH.name: EOMONTH
EOMONTH.performance_notes: SE-safe. Returns end of month N months from start date.

EDATE.name: EDATE
EDATE.performance_notes: SE-safe. Returns date N months from start date.

DATEDIFF.name: DATEDIFF
DATEDIFF.performance_notes: SE-safe. Intervals: SECOND, MINUTE, HOUR, DAY, WEEK, MONTH, QUARTER, YEAR.

WEEKDAY.name: WEEKDAY
WEEKDAY.performance_notes: SE-safe. Returns day of week as number.

WEEKNUM.name: WEEKNUM
WEEKNUM.performance_notes: SE-safe. Returns week number of the year.

UTCNOW.name: UTCNOW
UTCNOW.performance_notes: FE-only. Returns current UTC datetime. Prevents caching.

DATEADD.name: DATEADD
DATEADD.performance_notes: SE-safe. Core time intelligence function. Requires contiguous date column marked as date table.

PARALLELPERIOD.name: PARALLELPERIOD
PARALLELPERIOD.performance_notes: SE-safe. Returns full period (month/quarter/year) shifted by N intervals. Different from DATEADD which shifts individual dates.

DATESBETWEEN.name: DATESBETWEEN
DATESBETWEEN.performance_notes: SE-safe. Returns table of dates between start and end (inclusive).

DATESINPERIOD.name: DATESINPERIOD
DATESINPERIOD.performance_notes: SE-safe. Returns dates within N intervals from start date.

alternatives.use: CALCULATE with DATESYTD and year_end_date parameter
alternatives.improvement: More explicit control over fiscal year boundary

DATESYTD.name: DATESYTD
DATESYTD.performance_notes: SE-safe. Returns year-to-date dates from the date column.

STARTOFMONTH.name: STARTOFMONTH
STARTOFMONTH.performance_notes: SE-safe. Returns first date of the month in current filter context.

ENDOFMONTH.name: ENDOFMONTH
ENDOFMONTH.performance_notes: SE-safe. Returns last date of the month in current filter context.

STARTOFQUARTER.name: STARTOFQUARTER
STARTOFQUARTER.performance_notes: SE-safe. Returns first date of the quarter.

ENDOFQUARTER.name: ENDOFQUARTER
ENDOFQUARTER.performance_notes: SE-safe. Returns last date of the quarter.

STARTOFYEAR.name: STARTOFYEAR
STARTOFYEAR.performance_notes: SE-safe. Returns first date of the year.

ENDOFYEAR.name: ENDOFYEAR
ENDOFYEAR.performance_notes: SE-safe. Returns last date of the year.

FIRSTDATE.name: FIRSTDATE
FIRSTDATE.performance_notes: SE-safe. Returns first date visible in filter context.

LASTDATE.name: LASTDATE
LASTDATE.performance_notes: SE-safe. Returns last date visible in filter context. Prefer MAX for scalar date comparisons.

alternatives.improvement: Returns scalar directly, no table-to-scalar conversion needed

FIRSTNONBLANK.name: FIRSTNONBLANK
FIRSTNONBLANK.performance_notes: Iterates column to find first non-blank expression value. SE-pushable depends on expression.

LASTNONBLANK.name: LASTNONBLANK
LASTNONBLANK.performance_notes: Iterates column to find last non-blank expression value. Common for semi-additive measures (balance at end of period).

PREVIOUSMONTH.name: PREVIOUSMONTH
PREVIOUSMONTH.performance_notes: SE-safe. Returns all dates of the previous month.

PREVIOUSQUARTER.name: PREVIOUSQUARTER
PREVIOUSQUARTER.performance_notes: SE-safe. Returns all dates of the previous quarter.

PREVIOUSYEAR.name: PREVIOUSYEAR
PREVIOUSYEAR.performance_notes: SE-safe. Returns all dates of the previous year.

NEXTMONTH.name: NEXTMONTH
NEXTMONTH.performance_notes: SE-safe. Returns all dates of the next month.

NEXTQUARTER.name: NEXTQUARTER
NEXTQUARTER.performance_notes: SE-safe. Returns all dates of the next quarter.

NEXTYEAR.name: NEXTYEAR
NEXTYEAR.performance_notes: SE-safe. Returns all dates of the next year.

OPENINGBALANCEMONTH.name: OPENINGBALANCEMONTH
OPENINGBALANCEMONTH.performance_notes: SE-safe. Evaluates expression at the last date of the previous month.

CLOSINGBALANCEMONTH.name: CLOSINGBALANCEMONTH
CLOSINGBALANCEMONTH.performance_notes: SE-safe. Evaluates expression at the last date of the current month.

CLOSINGBALANCEYEAR.name: CLOSINGBALANCEYEAR
CLOSINGBALANCEYEAR.performance_notes: SE-safe. Evaluates expression at the last date of the current year.

DIVIDE.name: DIVIDE
DIVIDE.performance_notes: FE-only. Safe division (returns BLANK or alternate on divide-by-zero). In iterators, causes CallbackDataID. Use / operator with IF check when performance matters in iterators.

alternatives.when: Inside an iterator where denominator is never zero

ROUND.name: ROUND
ROUND.performance_notes: FE-only. Causes CallbackDataID in iterators. Use format strings for display rounding. Only use ROUND when the rounded value is needed in further calculations.

ROUNDUP.name: ROUNDUP
ROUNDUP.performance_notes: FE-only. Same CallbackDataID risk as ROUND.

ROUNDDOWN.name: ROUNDDOWN
ROUNDDOWN.performance_notes: FE-only. Same CallbackDataID risk as ROUND.

INT.name: INT
INT.performance_notes: SE-safe. Rounds down to nearest integer.

CEILING.name: CEILING
CEILING.performance_notes: FE-only. Rounds up to nearest multiple of significance.

FLOOR.name: FLOOR
FLOOR.performance_notes: FE-only. Rounds down to nearest multiple of significance.

POWER.name: POWER
POWER.performance_notes: SE-safe. Raises number to a power. Can also use ^ operator.

EXP.name: EXP
EXP.performance_notes: SE-safe. Returns e raised to the power of number.

TRUNC.name: TRUNC
TRUNC.performance_notes: SE-safe. Truncates to integer by removing fractional part.

CURRENCY.name: CURRENCY
CURRENCY.performance_notes: SE-safe. Converts to currency data type (fixed-point decimal with 4 decimal places).

STDEV.S.name: STDEV.S
STDEV.S.performance_notes: FE-only. Sample standard deviation of a column.

STDEV.P.name: STDEV.P
STDEV.P.performance_notes: FE-only. Population standard deviation of a column.

VAR.S.name: VAR.S
VAR.S.performance_notes: FE-only. Sample variance of a column.

VAR.P.name: VAR.P
VAR.P.performance_notes: FE-only. Population variance of a column.

GEOMEAN.name: GEOMEAN
GEOMEAN.performance_notes: FE-only. Geometric mean of a column.

GEOMEANX.name: GEOMEANX
GEOMEANX.performance_notes: FE-only iterator. Geometric mean over table expression.

alternatives.when: Geometric mean of a single column

RANK.name: RANK
RANK.performance_notes: FE-only window function. New DAX window function (2023+). More flexible than RANKX.

ROWNUMBER.name: ROWNUMBER
ROWNUMBER.performance_notes: FE-only window function. Assigns sequential row numbers.

ISBLANK.name: ISBLANK
ISBLANK.performance_notes: SE-safe. Checks if value is blank.

ISERROR.name: ISERROR
ISERROR.performance_notes: FE-only. Major CallbackDataID source in iterators. Error handling forces FE evaluation of every row.

ISEMPTY.name: ISEMPTY
ISEMPTY.performance_notes: SE-safe. Checks if table has no rows. More efficient than COUNTROWS(table) = 0.

ERROR.name: ERROR
ERROR.performance_notes: FE-only. Raises an error with specified message. Useful for defensive DAX.

USERCULTURE.name: USERCULTURE
USERCULTURE.performance_notes: FE-only. Returns locale string of current user.

USERNAME.name: USERNAME
USERNAME.performance_notes: FE-only. Returns current user identity. Used primarily in RLS.

IFERROR.name: IFERROR
IFERROR.performance_notes: FE-only. Major CallbackDataID source. Use DIVIDE for division errors. Avoid in iterators.

PATH.name: PATH
PATH.performance_notes: FE-only. Builds delimited path string for parent-child hierarchy. Use in calculated columns only.

PATHITEM.name: PATHITEM
PATHITEM.performance_notes: FE-only. Extracts item at position from a path string.

PATHITEMREVERSE.name: PATHITEMREVERSE
PATHITEMREVERSE.performance_notes: FE-only. Extracts item at position from end of path string.

PATHLENGTH.name: PATHLENGTH
PATHLENGTH.performance_notes: FE-only. Returns number of items in a path string.

PATHCONTAINS.name: PATHCONTAINS
PATHCONTAINS.performance_notes: FE-only. Checks if item exists in a path string.

SELECTEDMEASURE.name: SELECTEDMEASURE
SELECTEDMEASURE.performance_notes: Used inside calculation group items. Evaluates the currently selected measure.

SELECTEDMEASURENAME.name: SELECTEDMEASURENAME
SELECTEDMEASURENAME.performance_notes: FE-only. Returns name of currently selected measure as string. Used for conditional logic in calculation groups.

SELECTEDMEASUREFORMATSTRING.name: SELECTEDMEASUREFORMATSTRING
SELECTEDMEASUREFORMATSTRING.performance_notes: FE-only. Returns format string of currently selected measure. Used in dynamic format string expressions.

ISSELECTEDMEASURE.name: ISSELECTEDMEASURE
ISSELECTEDMEASURE.performance_notes: FE-only. Checks if specified measure is the one currently selected by the calculation group.

CALCULATIONGROUP.name: CALCULATIONGROUP
CALCULATIONGROUP.performance_notes: Returns the calculation group table. Used to reference calculation group columns in CALCULATE filters.

CONVERT.name: CONVERT
CONVERT.performance_notes: FE-only. Explicit type conversion. Types: INTEGER, DOUBLE, STRING, BOOLEAN, CURRENCY, DATETIME.

VALUE.name: VALUE
VALUE.performance_notes: FE-only. Converts text to number. Pre-compute in Power Query when possible.

alternatives.improvement: Done at refresh time, stored as numeric

FIXED.name: FIXED
FIXED.performance_notes: FE-only. Rounds and converts to text. Same issues as FORMAT — use format strings instead.

CALENDAR.name: CALENDAR
CALENDAR.performance_notes: SE-safe. Generates a single-column date table. Use for date dimension creation.

CALENDARAUTO.name: CALENDARAUTO
CALENDARAUTO.performance_notes: SE-safe. Auto-generates date range from model date columns.

OPENINGBALANCEQUARTER.name: OPENINGBALANCEQUARTER
OPENINGBALANCEQUARTER.performance_notes: SE-safe. Evaluates expression at the last date of the previous quarter.

CLOSINGBALANCEQUARTER.name: CLOSINGBALANCEQUARTER
CLOSINGBALANCEQUARTER.performance_notes: SE-safe. Evaluates expression at the last date of the current quarter.

OPENINGBALANCEYEAR.name: OPENINGBALANCEYEAR
OPENINGBALANCEYEAR.performance_notes: SE-safe. Evaluates expression at the last date of the previous year.

COMBINEVALUES.name: COMBINEVALUES
COMBINEVALUES.performance_notes: SE-safe when used in calculated columns. Optimized for composite key creation — enables DirectQuery query folding.

XIRR.name: XIRR
XIRR.performance_notes: FE-only. Internal rate of return for irregular cash flows. Iterative calculation.

XNPV.name: XNPV
XNPV.performance_notes: FE-only. Net present value for irregular cash flows.

NAMEOF.name: NAMEOF
NAMEOF.performance_notes: SE-safe. Returns the column or measure name as a string. Useful in dynamic expressions.

OFFSET.name: OFFSET
OFFSET.performance_notes: FE-only window function. Retrieves row at specified offset from current row.

WINDOW.name: WINDOW
WINDOW.performance_notes: FE-only window function. Defines a window of rows for aggregation. Complex but powerful.

INDEX.name: INDEX
INDEX.performance_notes: FE-only window function. Retrieves row at absolute position.

EVALUATEANDLOG.name: EVALUATEANDLOG
EVALUATEANDLOG.performance_notes: FE-only. Debugging function — logs value to profiler. Remove from production measures.

TOCSV.name: TOCSV
TOCSV.performance_notes: FE-only. Converts table to CSV string. Debugging utility.

TOJSON.name: TOJSON
TOJSON.performance_notes: FE-only. Converts table to JSON string. Debugging utility.

COLUMNSTATISTICS.name: COLUMNSTATISTICS
COLUMNSTATISTICS.performance_notes: SE-safe. Returns table of column statistics for all columns in the model.

DETAILROWS.name: DETAILROWS
DETAILROWS.performance_notes: Evaluates the Detail Rows expression defined on a measure. Used for drillthrough.

CURRENTGROUP.name: CURRENTGROUP
CURRENTGROUP.performance_notes: FE-only. Only valid inside GROUPBY aggregation expressions. Returns current group of rows.

NONVISUAL.name: NONVISUAL
NONVISUAL.performance_notes: Used in SUMMARIZECOLUMNS filter arguments. Marks a filter as non-visual to prevent auto-exist behavior.

IGNORE.name: IGNORE
IGNORE.performance_notes: Used in SUMMARIZECOLUMNS. Marks a measure to be ignored for blank-row removal.

ROLLUPGROUP.name: ROLLUPGROUP
ROLLUPGROUP.performance_notes: Used with SUMMARIZE for grouped subtotals (multiple columns rolled up together).

SUBSTITUTEWITHINDEX.name: SUBSTITUTEWITHINDEX
SUBSTITUTEWITHINDEX.performance_notes: Replaces column values with index positions. Used internally by VertiPaq. Rarely needed in user DAX.

EARLIER.name: EARLIER
EARLIER.performance_notes: FE-only. Accesses outer row context in nested iterations. Deprecated pattern — use VAR instead.

EARLIEST.name: EARLIEST
EARLIEST.performance_notes: FE-only. Accesses outermost row context. Deprecated — use VAR instead.

CONFIDENCE.NORM.name: CONFIDENCE.NORM
CONFIDENCE.NORM.performance_notes: FE-only. Confidence interval using normal distribution.

CONFIDENCE.T.name: CONFIDENCE.T
CONFIDENCE.T.performance_notes: FE-only. Confidence interval using Student's t-distribution.

COMBINA.name: COMBINA
COMBINA.performance_notes: FE-only. Number of combinations with repetitions.

EVEN.name: EVEN
EVEN.performance_notes: SE-safe. Rounds up to nearest even integer.

ODD.name: ODD
ODD.performance_notes: SE-safe. Rounds up to nearest odd integer.

RAND.name: RAND
RAND.performance_notes: FE-only. Returns random number between 0 and 1. Prevents caching. Non-deterministic.

RANDBETWEEN.name: RANDBETWEEN
RANDBETWEEN.performance_notes: FE-only. Random integer in range. Non-deterministic.

SIN.name: SIN
SIN.performance_notes: SE-safe. Sine of an angle in radians.

COS.name: COS
COS.performance_notes: SE-safe. Cosine of an angle in radians.

TAN.name: TAN
TAN.performance_notes: SE-safe. Tangent of an angle in radians.
